agreements.title: Pan Arab Free Trade Area / Greater Arab Free Trade Area (GAFTA)
agreements.summary: Arab trade facilitation and tariff elimination framework for participating Arab states.
agreements.benefits: Preferential/zero tariffs across many Arab markets subject to origin rules and product coverage.
agreements.rules_of_origin: Local value-added 40% or detailed product-specific origin rules, per GOEIC guidance.

agreements.title: COMESA
agreements.summary: Egypt is a COMESA member and grants customs exemptions for qualifying goods with COMESA certificates of origin.
agreements.benefits: Duty exemptions on qualifying goods; access to Eastern and Southern African markets.
agreements.rules_of_origin: Reference origin threshold around 45% value added per GAFI summary; confirm product-specific rules before shipment.

agreements.title: Agadir Agreement
agreements.partner_countries: Egypt, Jordan, Morocco, Tunisia (+ later accessions noted by EU)
agreements.summary: Free trade arrangement linking Egypt with Jordan, Morocco, and Tunisia, with cumulation benefits tied to Euro-Med rules.
agreements.benefits: Full tariff and non-tariff relief for covered industrial and agricultural products; cumulation helps access wider Euro-Med supply chains.
agreements.rules_of_origin: Detailed rules with diagonal cumulation under the Euro-Med framework.

agreements.title: EU-Egypt Association Agreement
agreements.summary: Creates a free-trade area for many industrial goods and facilitates trade in agricultural, processed agricultural, and fisheries products.
agreements.benefits: Tariff reduction/elimination across broad product groups and integration with Pan-Euro-Mediterranean origin framework.
agreements.rules_of_origin: Pan-Euro-Mediterranean rules of origin / EUR.1 / EUR-MED where applicable.

agreements.title: Egypt-EFTA Free Trade Agreement
agreements.summary: Free trade framework with EFTA states for industrial goods and selected agricultural/fisheries concessions.
agreements.benefits: Tariff elimination on many industrial exports and preferential treatment on selected agricultural goods.
agreements.rules_of_origin: Detailed origin rules; EUR.1 / EUR-MED depending on shipment route and cumulation context.

agreements.title: Egypt-Türkiye Free Trade Agreement
agreements.summary: Bilateral FTA creating phased liberalization and improved access for industrial and agricultural trade.
agreements.benefits: Immediate or phased customs exemptions across product lists and better integration into EU-facing supply chains.
agreements.rules_of_origin: Detailed preferential origin rules using EUR.1 / EUR-MED framework where applicable.

agreements.title: Egypt-MERCOSUR Free Trade Agreement
agreements.summary: Preferential agreement supporting Egyptian access to South American markets and lower import cost for selected goods from the bloc.
agreements.benefits: Preferential tariff treatment for exports and imports under covered schedules.
agreements.rules_of_origin: Preferential origin certification required; verify product-specific schedules before quoting.

agreements.title: African Continental Free Trade Area (AfCFTA)
agreements.summary: Continental framework to expand African trade; Egypt indicated operationalization from the beginning of 2021.
agreements.benefits: Preferential tariffs and broader African market access under negotiated schedules.
agreements.rules_of_origin: AfCFTA protocol rules of origin and tariff schedules; check the AfCFTA e-tariff tool for HS-specific treatment.

agreements.title: Egypt-United Kingdom Free Trade Agreement
agreements.summary: Post-Brexit continuity-style framework listed by GOEIC among active preferential agreements.
agreements.benefits: Continuity of preferential access for covered goods with UK market routing.
agreements.rules_of_origin: Pan-Euro-Med style origin references/EUR.1-EUR-MED documentation as specified by official guidance.

agreements.title: Egypt-Serbia Free Trade Agreement
agreements.summary: GOEIC lists the Serbia agreement among Egypt’s active agreements as of the March 2026 update.
agreements.benefits: Preferential bilateral market access subject to the agreement schedules.
agreements.rules_of_origin: Detailed preferential rules and certificate requirements per GOEIC guidance.

agreements.title: Qualified Industrial Zones (QIZ)
agreements.summary: Duty-free access to the US market for goods produced in approved Egyptian zones that satisfy QIZ origin requirements.
agreements.benefits: Duty-free access to US market for qualifying products from approved zones.
agreements.rules_of_origin: Requires compliance with the QIZ agreed origin content and zone conditions.

agreements.title: Generalized System of Preferences (GSP)
agreements.summary: GOEIC lists GSP as a preference scheme; availability depends on the granting country’s program status and product coverage.
agreements.benefits: Potential tariff preferences where the importing country still operates GSP for Egyptian goods.
agreements.rules_of_origin: Program-specific rules of origin and documentary requirements.

agreements.title: GSTP - Global System of Trade Preferences
agreements.summary: GOEIC lists GSTP as a preferential trade framework among participating developing countries.
agreements.benefits: Potential tariff preferences for covered products among participating members.
agreements.rules_of_origin: Scheme-specific origin rules and certificate requirements.

laws.title: Investment Laws & Regulations Portal
laws.summary: Official GAFI portal aggregating Egypt investment laws, regulations, and downloadable legal texts.
laws.benefits: Single official starting point for investment law references relevant to foreign investors and project setup.

laws.title: Investment Law No. 72 of 2017
laws.summary: Core investment framework governing guarantees, incentives, and investor treatment in Egypt.
laws.benefits: Key legal base for investment protections and incentives.

laws.title: Executive Regulation of the Investment Law
laws.summary: Executive regulation implementing the Investment Law and detailing incentives and procedures.
laws.benefits: Operational legal detail for applying the investment regime.

laws.title: GOEIC Laws and Decisions Portal
laws.summary: Official GOEIC list of ministerial decisions and rules organizing import, export, origin, and trade registrations.
laws.benefits: Useful searchable hub for current procedural decisions affecting exporters/importers.

laws.title: Import and Export Executive Decree No. 770/2005
laws.summary: Ministerial decree governing a wide range of import/export registration and procedures.
laws.benefits: Key operational reference for exporter/importer compliance.

laws.title: Customs Law No. 207 of 2020 / Executive Regulation No. 430 of 2021
laws.summary: Core customs framework referenced by Nafeza for ACID, document submission, and shipment procedures.
laws.benefits: Essential legal base for import clearance and pre-arrival cargo information workflows.
